title: OCI User MFA Not Enabled
description: Detects OCI user accounts where multi-factor authentication has been disabled or not configured, violating STIG requirement for strong authentication.
query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' and ((('Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.identitycontrolplane.deletemfatotpdevice' or 'Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.identitycontrolplane.deletemfatotpdevice')))
